title: F1 2026 Explained: New Rules, New Engines  and a Possible Downfall? #automobile #f1technology
description:
The Formula 1 2026 regulations will launch a completely new era of F1. New engine rules, major aerodynamic changes, sustainable fuel innovations, and a potential shake-up of the competitive order.

But will this revolution bring closer racing and new legends… or create another era of domination and unexpected downfall?

In this video we break down:

The new F1 2026 technical regulations

The new power unit changes and hybrid system

Which teams could dominate

Which teams are at serious risk

title: Bahrain F1 Pre-Season Testing Explained — What We Actually Learned
description:
Bahrain pre-season testing is over — but the lap times didn’t tell the real story.

Behind the calm headlines and misleading timesheets, teams revealed far more than they wanted to. Confidence issues, hidden pace, early struggles, and subtle signs of who understands the new regulations… and who doesn’t.

In this video, we break down what actually mattered during Bahrain testing:
• Which teams looked comfortable
• Who might be hiding performance
• Where the early cracks are appearing
• And why th

title: Max Verstappen Driving Incredibly for 70 Minutes
description:
Since joining F1 as a 17-year-old rookie, Max Verstappen has been destined for greatness. Already the holder of just about every record imaginable, enjoy an hour and 10 minutes of the Dutch master's very best racecraft in Formula 1... so far.

0:00 - Malaysia 2015, First Points
3:43 - Spain 2016, Red Bull debut win
9:00 - Brazil 2016, Epic comeback
16:45 - Austria 2018, Red Bull home win
22:08 - Austria 2019, Just an inchident
28:10 - Hungary 2022, Spin to win
32:25 - Belgium 2022, What penalty?

Our latest video explains that surprise and where Ferrari stands ahead of the next pre-season test.

title: Every F1 Grand Slam of the 21st Century So Far
description:
A Grand Chelem - or Grand Slam - is the rarest achievement in Formula 1. Just 27 drivers have done it in the sport's history - and only 14 of those have achieved it more than once. Join us as we look back over the 24 times it's happened since the turn of the millennium in 2000!

6:01 - Sebastian Vettel

title: Barcelona Shakedown EXPLAINED: Every F1 2026 Team’s Real Situation
description:
F1 2026 finally hit the track for real in Barcelona – and the first five days of running have given us a very early look at the new era.

On paper, Lewis Hamilton was fastest of the week for Ferrari with a 1:16.348.

But when you dig into the data, it’s Mercedes – with 500 laps on the W17 – and the power unit manufacturers who really stand out.

In this video, we go team by team through the full Barcelona shakedown:

• What each team actually did on track
• How many laps they completed
• Who sol

title: Lando’s Champion Evolution & Brad Pitt’s ‘Need For Speed’ | The Best of 2025 Beyond The Grid Podcast
description:
A title fight full of twists and turns, a new World Champion, rookies reaching major milestones and Formula 1 on the big screen.

The 2025 season was nothing short of dramatic on and off track. Here, on F1 Beyond The Grid, Tom Clarkson has sat down with the people in the thick of all that drama and in this end-of-year special, Tom picks out his highlights.

You’ll hear from the new World Champion Lando Norris, who reveals how he changed his mental approach to racing, and his race engineer Will J

title: Formula 1 Cars, Explained with Max Verstappen
description:
These are more than cars. They’re science experiments.
If you enjoy this episode, subscribe to support more optimistic stories about tech!

I love Formula 1. This isn’t just a car race, it’s a massive group science competition. Ten teams are all fighting to be first, and on every team there are hundreds of people, spending millions of dollars, all working together to push technology to its limit. 

In this video, we’re gonna show you what it takes to build and drive some of the fastest and most

title: World's Fastest Camera Drone Vs F1 Car (ft. Max Verstappen)
description:
This is Formula 1 like you’ve never seen it before. The @dutchdronegods follow Max Verstappen’s brand new @redbullracing  RB20 F1 car for a full lap of Silverstone’s Grand Prix Circuit. The world first uninterrupted FPV one shot was captured by a manually piloted custom built drone, designed specifically for the challenge of keeping up with the car at speeds of over 300kph.

It took Red Bull and the Dutch Drone Gods over a year to create a drone that can accelerate two times faster than an F1 ca

title: F1 Car vs MotoGP Bike vs Rally Car: Ultimate Drag Race!

🔥 full vehicle details 🔥 
👉 @redbullracing  2012 F1 world championship-winning RB8 car – driven by @VisaCashAppRB  F1 driver Liam Lawson 🇳🇿
